name: Chicken and Black Bean Quesadillas
recipeIngredient: 1 pound skinless boneless chicken breasts, cooked
1 1/2 cups shredded lowfat cheddar cheese, or Jack
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Slice chicken into 1/2-inch pieces.
3. Heat olive oil in a nonstick skillet over medium heat. Sauté peppers, onions, and chili powder until vegetables are slightly softened, about 3 minutes. Remove from heat.
4. Place 4 tortillas on a large baking sheet. Evenly spread beans over the tortillas. Top with pepper mixture, chicken pieces, and cheese. Cover each with remaining tortillas.
5. Bake until heated through and cheese is melted, about 15 minutes.
6. Cut each quesadilla into quarters and serve with salsa, sour cream, and cilantro.
